component.name: Linux Archductor
component.summary: Linux-native parallel coding-agent workflow tool built around Git worktrees

description.p: Linux Archductor gives you the Archductor workflow model on Linux. Each coding task gets its own isolated Git worktree, branch, terminal, agent session, diff viewer, checks panel, and pull request path.
Multiple Codex, Claude Code, or shell sessions can run in parallel across separate workspaces from the same repository, each with its own stable port block and environment.

ul.li: Create and manage Git worktree workspaces
Launch Codex, Claude Code, or shell sessions per workspace
Run setup and dev scripts with Archductor environment variables
Show changed files and unified diffs
Push branches and create GitHub pull requests via gh
Track local todos, review comments, and checkpoints
Detect file conflicts across parallel workspaces
Distro-aware doctor command for dependency guidance
